creator: fidaj@ukr.net
text:
I updated the ports tree to revision 346185
I began to update ports from source using portmaster


In the port, the following options:
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=BS2B
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=ENCA
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=LADSPA
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=LCMS2
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=LIRC
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=CDIO
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DVDNAV
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=LIBBLURAY
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=V4L
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=QUVI
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=SMB
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=CACA
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=OPENGL
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=VAAPI
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=VDPAU
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=XINERAMA
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=JACK
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=PULSEAUDIO



Update the port completes the following error:
